untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'historical resistance level' and validation that it 'was previously defended' (tested at least once in prior 20 bars). No allowed indicator directly identifies dynamic support/resistance levels or counts prior touches. Pivot levels (r1, s1) used as proxy for resistance, but cannot verify the 'previously tested' requirement without custom resistance detection logic not available in allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated using pivot r1 as resistance level proxy and price_pos_20 to indicate position near top of 20-bar range (indicating previous testing). Entry uses crosses_above for breakout confirmation. Exit conditions match specification: close below resistance (r1) or can be paired with trailing stop at 1% below highest close (requires runtime implementation). Context-dependent direction interpreted as LONG given breakout interpretation.
